character_dossiers.name: Mr. Hands
character_dossiers.biography: Mr. Hands is a sailor with a leg injury who uses a dirk. He has a history of sailing and has been involved in violent acts.

character_dossiers.name: Cap'n Hawkins
character_dossiers.biography: Cap'n Hawkins is a captain who navigates the schooner and has a plan to get it into a sheltered anchorage.
